mapper.select: SELECT I.ITEM_SEQ AS itemSeq , I.ITEM_NAME AS itemName , I.ITEM_PRICE AS itemPrice , I.ITEM_STOCK AS itemStock , I.ITEM_DESC AS itemDesc , I.REG_DATE AS regDate , I.CATEGORY AS category , I.ORIGINALFILENAME AS originalFileName , I.SAVEFILENAME AS saveFileName , I.FILE_PATH AS filePath , I.SUB_IMAGES AS subFileNames FROM SHOP_ITEM I WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY I.REG_DATE DESC
